check.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v postconf >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf Compliant; exit 0; fi; v=$(postconf -n smtpd_client_restrictions | sed "s/[[:space:]]//g"); [ "$v" = "smtpd_client_restrictions=permit_mynetworks,reject" ] && printf Compliant'

checks.description: RHEL 9 must be configured to prevent unrestricted mail relaying.
RHEL 9 system accounts must not have an interactive login shell.
